title: elymus abolinii
intro: Elymus abolinii, also known as Abolin's wheat grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elymus abolinii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture, and its herbal preparations are also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
